name: Team Warren
subject: No one becomes that rich on their own
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Leon Cooperman is so threatened by Elizabeth's plans for a wealth tax and rooting out corruption in Washington that he's making a decision to side with his fellow billionaires over working people. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ff7/45c30650/1074447f5/66f59222/448902/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Earlier today, Leon Cooperman -- billionaire and shareholder in a student loan company that has cheated millions of borrowers -- announced that he will be supporting fellow billionaire Michael Bloomberg for President.

**Is _anyone_ surprised?**

Leon Cooperman is so threatened by Elizabeth's plans for a wealth tax and rooting out corruption in Washington that he's making a decision to side with his fellow billionaires over working people.

The wealthy and well-connected will always protect each other at the expense of everyone else, and it's going to take a grassroots movement to stop them.

[**You're an important part of this team, and your support would go a long way towards continuing to build our movement. Can you chip in to help reach our goal today of $1 million before the end of the week?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ff7/45c30650/1074447f5/66f59225/448902/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDM1Rl9FR0xfTkZGX1RfMjAxOTExMDhfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML35F_EGL_NFF_T_20191108_V1S2_P_T1") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
>
**Leon Cooperman is not alone.** While we have the biggest wealth gap since the Great Depression, a climate crisis that threatens humanity as we know it, an unsustainable and predatory health care system, and the most corrupt president in history in the White House, the wealthy and well-connected have shown again and again that they are more interested in protecting their riches and hoarding their wealth than paying their fair share.

No one becomes that rich on their own. And Elizabeth has a plan to make sure that the wealthy and well-connected pay their fair share -- but she can't do it alone, and she needs your help.

**We're so close to reaching our goal of raising $1 million by the end of the week, and your support would go a long way towards continuing our momentum, all the way into the White House.**

[**Can you chip in $3 or anything you can to help hit our goal and put economic and political power in the hands of working people?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ff7/45c30650/1074447f5/66f59225/448902/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDM1Rl9FR0xfTkZGX1RfMjAxOTExMDhfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML35F_EGL_NFF_T_20191108_V1S2_P_T1")

Thanks,

Team Warren

[ **DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528ff7/45c30650/1074447f5/66f59225/448902/VEsHDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDM1Rl9FR0xfTkZGX1RfMjAxOTExMDhfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML35F_EGL_NFF_T_20191108_V1S2_P_T1")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I’m personally asking you to endorse my campaign for President today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19) **I’m personally asking you to endorse my campaign for President today.

[Add your name to show your support. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191108PM-all&t=6&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)** | [Add your name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191108PM-all&t=9&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)
---
Yang Gang --

I am currently campaigning in New Hampshire, where we just filed to be on the primary ballot -- which is huge!

This week has been an exciting one for us. We aired our first TV ad in Iowa, called winners of the Freedom Dividend, and continued to shock the establishment.

I am proud to be running a campaign that focuses on putting Humanity First. And while the media and establishment want to write us off as a long shot campaign, they can’t write off our passion for what we’re fighting for.

You are why this campaign has made it this far -- and frankly, we are only growing. [**If you stand with our Humanity First values and support my campaign, add your name here:**](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191108PM-all&t=8&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)
[Endorse My Campaign](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191108PM-all&t=7&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)
---
I am not a politician. I never dreamed of running for president, but I saw the state of our country and I knew I had to do everything in my power to leave a better country for my children.

But I need you to step up with me and support my campaign. Together, we can be the change our country needs and build an economy that focuses on putting our people first.

I am thankful to the ever-growing Yang Gang -- a bold group of supporters that is willing to stand with fellow Americans and put people over politics as usual. There is nothing the Yang Gang can’t accomplish -- and it is how we are going to win in 2020.

[**If you stand with me, add your name to show your support for this campaign. We can take this all the way to the White House.**](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191108PM-endorseandrew?source=email-20191108PM-all&t=10&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)

Thank you for your support. Let’s keep building this wave.

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16475?t=2&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=3&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=5&akid=2919%2E377263%2EFa7e19)

name: Addisu Demissie
subject: Hey -- I'm not going to lie. This won't be easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| It's time to have a real conversation about what's at stake in the next month of this race, team. When the DNC raised the threshold to make it to the debate stage in December, they put our campaign on the bubble. Each presidential candidate must have at least 200,000 individual donors (we're less than 15,000 shy) -- _and_ hit 4% in at least four polls (we're not there yet, either). **Our team has a plan to lock down Cory 's spot on that stage, but I'm not going to lie: This won't be easy. It will take each of us doing our part.** **[If you've been waiting to make a donation to this campaign, now's the time we need it most -- chip in to help secure Cory's spot in the December debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191108_AD_20191108-fr-AD-realtalk-actives_ndnrs_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** If we don't make the cut for this round, let's be honest: That debate will be missing a critical voice in this race. Cory's voice is all about unifying our party, not working to tear each other down. If he doesn't make it to that stage, there won't be someone up there talking about the importance of courageous empathy, or how we can tackle some of our biggest issues -- from the racial wealth gap to the gun violence epidemic -- by reminding people that we're all in this together. While other candidates fight it out over small policy differences, Cory knows that the only way we can beat Donald Trump and heal our country isn't by attacking each other, it's by recognizing that we need each other in order to succeed. That's a voice we need in this race, team. **[If you're with Cory, then please make a donation to this campaign today and let's get him on that stage.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191108_AD_20191108-fr-AD-realtalk-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Addisu Addisu Demissie
Campaign Manager
Cory 2020 [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191108_AD_20191108-fr-AD-realtalk-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6ea8/2413091377/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6eb7/2413091377/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6eb6/2413091377/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6eb5/2413091377/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6eb4/2413091377/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a96/5fca0d19/766fdbe6/291c6ea8/2413091377/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Steve Bullock
subject: big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BULLOCK FOR PRESIDENT
body:
I'm excited to tell you: |
---
I'm excited to tell you: **[I'm launching my first TV ad!](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb830c/6aee0046/44f19ca9/2e2c74d8/847882481/VEsH/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfp2020_fr_nov19-ad?refcode=SB_EM_FR_2019.11.06_B1_TV_X__F1_S1_C1__sdb2&amount=15&amounts=5,35,50,50,100,250")**

After Tuesday's elections, it's clear we need a nominee who won't just win on the coasts, but can win in states like Kentucky, Iowa, Texas, and all across the country.

As the only Democrat in the race who's actually won a Trump state, I know winning starts by going everywhere, not retreating to our corners.

That's what our new ad will show caucus-goers across Iowa.

**We 're pushing to get as many individual donations as we can today to not only pay for our new ad, but show there's _unprecedented_ momentum behind our campaign. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now?** | | [MATCH $5 NOW->](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb830c/6aee0046/44f19ca9/2e2c74d9/847882481/VEsE/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfp2020_fr_nov19-ad?refcode=SB_EM_FR_2019.11.06_B1_TV_X__F1_S1_C1__sdb2&amount=5&amounts=5,35,50,50,100,250")

---
Look, in Montana I won with Trump on the ballot. I won with Mitt Romney on the ballot. I won with John McCain on the ballot.

Here's how I did it:

I went everywhere, spoke with everyone, and listened more than I talked. I focused on solutions to the issues people face in the here and now -- and I got things done.

We don't need to compromise our progressive values to win back the places we lost.

That's what this campaign is all about -- and that's why I want everyone to see our new ad. **Let 's prove that we can win the red states, we can win the purple states, and we can win the blue states.**

Your help is crucial to keep our ad running, build our campaign, and win this race.

**[So if you're with me, chip in today and help give Trump the boot in every state in the country.](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb830c/6aee0046/44f19ca9/2e2c74d8/847882481/VEsO/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfp2020_fr_nov19-ad?refcode=SB_EM_FR_2019.11.06_B1_TV_X__F1_S1_C1__sdb2&amount=15&amounts=5,35,50,50,100,250")**

Thanks so much for your support,

Steve

**Steve Bullock is the only candidate for President who 's actually won a Trump state. He is our best chance to take back the White House in 2020.**

Our campaign won't take any money from PACs, so we rely entirely on donations from people like you. **If you want to beat Donald Trump and get our country back on track, click the button below to donate. Any amount makes a big difference!** | | [Donate now ->](https://go.stevebullock.com/page/m/63eb830c/6aee0046/44f19ca9/2e2c74c0/847882481/VEsHBA/?g=oQGeHFH8x8VbdRGKDAJp3Q "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfp2020_fr_email_may2019?refcode=footer-button&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

| Team - we've got great news.

[A new group of local elected officials and community members in Iowa and New Hampshire have endorsed Michael, saying that he has what it takes to beat Donald Trump!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1a/134673f2/a65813b/6997c417/251168636/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Nine million people voted twice for Barack Obama and once for Trump. These endorsements are just the most recent nod that shows Michael has the progressive and pragmatic plans to win swing voters over again.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1a/134673f2/a65813b/6997c417/251168636/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Reminder: Open Enrollment for the ACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hey Peter,

I’ll keep this short: the 2020 Open Enrollment Period for Affordable Care Act plans runs until midnight on Sunday, December 15.

Please make sure you get covered if you need healthcare.

**_[If you have any questions or want to enroll, you can go to https://healthcare.gov.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695934/119359221/-1790959535?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=&emci=19194421-a500-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d0aa05d-1203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)_**

The Trump Administration continues to slash the ACA budget to advertise Open Enrollment, so it’s up to us to let our friends, family, and neighbors know about this deadline.

**_[Share this Open Enrollment news on Facebook here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695935/119359222/989981403?u=https://www.healthcare.gov/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=&emci=19194421-a500-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d0aa05d-1203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)_**

**_[Share this Open Enrollment news on Twitter here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695936/119359223/-960863043?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=&emci=19194421-a500-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d0aa05d-1203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)_**

This is one of the biggest reasons I’m running for Congress: we need to protect the ACA from extreme politicians like Steve King and fight to make sure that every American has access to quality, affordable healthcare.

Thank you,

J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695937/119359224/-1319866263?refcode=em19_191109_openenroll_JD_button&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695938/119359225/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=&emci=19194421-a500-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d0aa05d-1203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11695939/119359226/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDBhYTA1ZC0xMjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q8T4fhSj0-EVl5wxIDGUMqTYJhV_pt_W34s6vUpv7yw=&emci=19194421-a500-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=8d0aa05d-1203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). name: Matt Gaetz
subject: ...this is about doing what's right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
What the Democrats are doing to our President and our country is disgusting. They continue to march forward with the impeachment of President Trump without any substantial evidence. Shifty Adam Schiff has openly lied to the American people in hopes of being the golden goose that caught President Trump.
They are more focused on dividing the country and destroying President Trump than doing what's right.

Friend,

Liberals have set their eyes on turning Texas blue. They have already poured millions of dollars into Texas, because if they win Texas they will control the Presidency, the Senate Majority and the House Majority.
“We strongly believe that Texas is a battleground”
\- Tom Perez (DNC Chairman)
"I think you’re going to turn Texas blue...”
\- Joe Biden
“Texas is our hope for the future.”
\- Nancy Pelosi
As you can see, Texas is at the top of Democrats minds and they will stop at nothing until they turn Texas blue.
****[KEEP TEXAS RED](http://links.johncornyn.com/u/click?_t=77be7e7c69cd43dfb0a9eb38fa6f500b&_m=f524beac715446638a19e63d532d6cdc&_e=DwfL2cC55rokWMlpZUtkOBL9dqHqBTg5IkqFTZCo_-4Mjd-cOrzifqsmVmsh-3I1x0RD0AfTHhDG10hvfW7ZX3cyTYSQ3mVR71YTaxDpRqD5pP5BJPOxsic-FsFcULo5Un1aXbzQqU3shlH7kSGEl55NiiM70OdOM5ilSO5ndHW6nU6-YKpeaQ1eVQ2quM20LKXiNsK8P5QTWQNdbH-wBx6q1IqbTRBqttMryk23FKhcwVAfxZy8nIKh8OD731qK3lDnuKsmjeTwZI6DQUKyqHIPjJq-hYTz5JesJPOWnSlEcLYaDk6p1x0wu4I_dTvvgeNg9jVfG4HSITNOLp-aWjcWkA9GNa4KElCVW9Rtgum-IFZvzDzUkum6n_JF6SC91xsWyuivmGK_anU3y0LHtIZBOWhdRUrYdanpdz6mb9W_OaJkkG13X6mfCkxiq1Tj)****

John Cornyn

body:
Last night, it was reported that another billionaire -- Michael Bloomberg -- is taking steps to enter the Democratic primary for president in 2020 | | |
---
Last night, it was reported that another billionaire -- Michael Bloomberg -- is taking steps to enter the Democratic primary for president in 2020 (he would pay over $3 billion next year under Elizabeth's wealth tax).

And now today, his fellow billionaire Leon Cooperman (he would pay $151 million) wasted no time and endorsed Bloomberg's potential candidacy.

**The wealthy and well-connected will always have each other's backs. They may have money and influence -- but we have our voices and our votes. And come Election Day, there will be more of us than there are of them.**

But in order to build a grassroots movement -- fueled by the people, not the billionaires -- Elizabeth needs your help.

**Then** , some of the wealthy few that would be affected by the tax started sounding the alarm -- going on national television, literally shedding tears, writing op-eds, and trying to stop our movement in its tracks.

**And now, just moments ago, news broke that Michael Bloomberg -- one of the first billionaires to attack Elizabeth's plan for a wealth tax -- is taking steps to enter the Democratic primary for president in 2020.**

**The wealthy and well connected are scared.** They're scared that under a Warren presidency, they would no longer have a government that caters to their every need. When faced with the prospect of paying his fair share in taxes so that we can level the playing field for working families, Bloomberg has chosen to protect his wealth over everyone else -- and that's why he'd rather spend enormous amounts of money on a presidential run than pay taxes.

**And we have to fight our hearts out to stop it.**

Your support matters because Elizabeth isn't self-funding, she doesn't have a Super PAC, and we don't host any fundraisers where wealthy donors write big checks to spend time with her behind closed doors.

Texas is the nation's largest battleground state, Peter, and the experts know it!
**FIRST** _The Hill_ reported that Senator Cornyn was facing his "toughest race yet," and _The Washington Post_ wrote that Texas' Senate seat was one of the top 10 "most likely to flip."

**THEN** MJ worked hard to spread her message across Texas and start building a **strong grassroots campaign** , all thanks to the help of **[supporters like you](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890858/7f51f7bc/4bc5cddc/4ef0b598/2392564353/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-largestbattleground?refcode=email_20191108nd__486__&amount=10&recurring=true")**!

**NOW with less than a year until Election Day,_Roll Call_ has just named Sen. Cornyn one of "the 10 most vulnerable senators in 2020!"**
**We can win this race and finally send someone with real Texas values to fight for us in the Senate, but it won 't happen without your support! Pitch in now to help us grow MJ's grassroots campaign into a Texas-sized force that can _beat_ Senator Cornyn:**

Friend, wow. A few days ago, we asked all of our supporters to share why you're backing Mondaire Jones for Congress. So far, the response has been overwhelming; we received some very uplifting, thorough, and thoughtful responses. **We want to share a few of them with you** – but first, while we've had a great response from Team Mondaire, the only way we can win this race is if we grow this team as much as possible. **[_Will you give whatever you can as soon as you can so we have the resources we need to bring more folks onboard?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2wk/wzRYS_nERkeTTxfDWDGn6g/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI2NHZMUfLha9fAMU7xug9cfbVB59TEElsJk-2BQIh3k1qq1JsPI-2BeiOWDbXYa-2FFzZBxK4eFkXRjJL3-2FvU1-2B9CnazewxinREiSlOqUDP96fuF4Z9I8UlnffIZA4sW7XEEx-2B8BtFwxu6JkAvp4ykshwiA2-2FFqdht89m-2BpX4sS-2FqoiKIK0RCCrzOxgSEwjNt741AYy0EhFj5d3wwcYPPKV6jBQa7fTUqXeKKJU1Z1MSgPri179rCNklCkmp2IaFRuJ0ymTQ-2Fu7uvEa3xMQKwVuCInk-2Bg-3D-3D/wDHl)** [Donate $3 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2wk/wzRYS_nERkeTTxfDWDGn6g/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI2NHZMUfLha9fAMU7xug9cfbVB59TEElsJk-2BQIh3k1qqN2LF-2Fhd9bV1d-2BHzITZMh0Wi0rrfBPufjmk0-2Bbu6asN-2F9evyIMt4csQBiGgsk9llD6YnOoMWgKn17AZhzlmhKNwc-2FZei3l-2Bt6EpbN2NFNEI-2FBJYN9jvCXn-2Fj8lJIjnknzbf34c3vsrtD2PG97hvWl5FY-2Bosc5GMqxwrg86E1b271BO99sOuRDXw4-2BJKKKck79A64VvgLZ5lABrFtqBEkohqVjQDPr3pvK63SItTHEFBQ-3D-3D/3t7h) Some of the responses we received were direct: "He's a good honest democrat." "He's progressive." "Working class hero." One team member told us they're backing Mondaire because "[h]e is progressive and he seems real, genuine." Other folks sent in more detailed reasons for supporting Mondaire, including:
* "Mondaire has signed the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge and supports the Green New Deal. We need more climate-focused leaders in office, and Mondaire clearly supports climate plans."
* "I support Mondaire because Washington needs representatives who are willing to work for and are accountable to the people that elected them."
* "His own compelling story, particularly including his time in the Obama administration."

We always knew we had some of the best supporters out there, and this confirms it. But, like we said, we're going to need to convert a lot more folks into supporters for us to win this crowded race. **We know Mondaire is the best person for the job.[_If you agree, give as much as you can, as soon as you can, so we can spread the word and bring more people onto the team._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/_AA/ni0YAA/t.2wk/wzRYS_nERkeTTxfDWDGn6g/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI2NHZMUfLha9fAMU7xug9cfbVB59TEElsJk-2BQIh3k1qpEYcaVX-2FEvU8-2FUgKD-2FQxGzy3DZZLVP8AHqELwr-2F8slygrzFkSfsq3QrbTROYqfs6tHdoAMSe6AV9POhGX28bcbTJL2JArr1do9PMx2OXLyhPOzJqlv2OS-2FwXCXMP1HGQR0Zne01Y6gWOJSRcgu3wd4t3BbTZzBNpvTIqNNA4oCDgTg4m2u-2Bh2gYVo5nf4ziwefAa851Hvd8ZBTLRJ-2BJdVejaSmWxmOi7KE4fa7Utps1w-3D-3D/Zm1p)** Thanks, and enjoy your weekend! name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: the key to beating Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
People across Virginia and around the country have been stepping up to help Mark defend Virginia's Senate seat.
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7cd/53d9897e/522b5d7b/1c891881/3453236154/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjMyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-supporter?refcode=20191109nd__326__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")

Derek,

People across Virginia and around the country have been stepping up to help Mark defend Virginia's Senate seat.

Mark's grassroots donors know that winning Virginia is key to beating Donald Trump in 2020, and that without Virginia, there's no path to taking back the Senate. The fact is, Mark won by less than 1% in 2014, and with GOP challengers now in the race against him, we need all the help we can get.

**Derek, our records indicate strong numbers from Manassas, but we don't have a record for you on file. Would you make your first donation today to help Mark keep Virginia blue in 2020?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Before you start your Saturday . . .
body:
Before you start your weekend, I wanted to share this video of my friend, Wayne Allyn Root.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353009-821901-4711597-37a6004172-9bbea062df)
Patriot,

Before you start your Saturday, I wanted to share [**this video**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353009-821901-4711596-61529f3a4e-9bbea062df) of my friend, Wayne Allyn Root.

Wayne's enthusiasm is infectious, and I promise, when you watch it, he will put a smile on your face!

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353009-821901-4711596-61529f3a4e-9bbea062df)
I'm so proud to have him supporting my run for Congress, and if you haven't done so already, [**please join him today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353009-821901-4711596-61529f3a4e-9bbea062df).

Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. After you [**watch Wayne 's video**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-353009-821901-4711596-61529f3a4e-9bbea062df), please post to social media (since I cannot) and share it with your friends and family.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: #MoscowMitch: An impeachment hypocrite
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell continues to stand by Trump throughout this impeachment inquiry, and now, he's truly shown America how hypocritical he really is. He said that the House's impeachment resolution denies Trump "his most basic rights of due process." Ignoring the fact that he supported Trump denying migrants any due process. Ignoring the fact that he ensured Betsy DeVos's confirmation as Education Secretary, allowing her to deny due process to survivors of sexual assault. Ignoring the fact that he denied Obama's nominee for Supreme Court, Merrick Garland, his due process or even a hearing. Sadly, we know Mitch will only continue his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling as long as he's in the Senate. We need to know what Democrats think of him so we can create the best strategy to get rid of him in 2020: **Do you approve of Mitch McConnell?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc47/6e9863e8/1624e686/1db099dd/1102900170/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/AqhtOKym") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc47/6e9863e8/1624e686/1db099dd/1102900170/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/AqhtOKym") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc47/6e9863e8/1624e686/1db099dc/1102900170/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcgrathvmitch-nd?refcode=OUT20191109a.ND-b&refcode2=7uzgm1Up22SN5iZHiluF")

| Hey there, We've been writing to you a lot about the DNC threshold for December debate -- each candidate must have at least _200,000 individual donors_ and hit _4% in at least four polls_ to qualify. And we have not met either requirement yet. Don't worry we have a big, bold plan to get Cory on that stage alongside Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Amy Klobuchar, and Pete Buttigieg. _But it will take all of us chipping in to see it all the way through._ **That 's why today, I'm excited to kick off our brand new Ground Game Fund -- but we need $550,000 by 11:59 p.m. on November 15th to fund it. name: Carly Reilly
subject: I’m not liking what I’m seeing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need to turn things around, quickly

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt) [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=5&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt) Yang Gang --

When we set our goal of raising $1 million before November 13th, I assumed we’d hit it. After all, we’ve never missed a public goal before. And with so much on the line, I knew the Yang Gang would step up again.

To qualify for the December debate, we have to hit a series of polling thresholds in the early states. That’s why we sunk $1 million into a statewide ad campaign in Iowa. If we hit our goal, we’ll double our investment and keep our ad on the air for another week.

Yang Gang, whether we qualify for the December debates or not is up to you. It’s that simple. And right now, I’m no longer certain we’ll hit our goal.

**[But it’s not too late to turn things around. We need you to step up, donate whatever you can, and help us hit this goal so we can keep our ads on the air and qualify for the December debate.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=13&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=7&amount=25&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---
Missing the December debate is not an option. Taking our ads off the air is not an option. Losing momentum in this campaign is not an option.

The Yang Gang has never missed a goal -- and we’re not going to start now. Let’s kick things into high gear and turn it around.

Donate now and see your donation count on Yang2020.com, our real-time tracker.

Let’s do this,

Carly Reilly
Finance Director
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16487?t=6&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2920%2E377263%2EKVhvyt) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

New York, NY

name: Frank, Citizens for Turner
subject: Pelosi & Schiff putting America in the danger zone!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEwNzc3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY0MDc4NzUwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

America is running out of time! Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff continue to stifle our country's growth by running an out of control, closed door impeachment process.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDEwNzc3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDc4NzUwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=27&ms=NDEwNzc3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDc4NzUwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
[_**America is running out of time!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEwNzc3NTkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MDc4NzUwNQS2&mt=1&rt=0) Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff continue to stifle our country's growth by running an out of control, closed door impeachment process. Congress has grinded to a halt because of a partisan, circus show impeachment.
If we do not get Congress back on track, America will be put on an irreversible path that will harm American democracy as we know it.

subject: Get yours now

body:
Melania hand picked our Official 2020 Trump Calendars. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8306c7f0eb1b77fffb9fa942ba40a01bf73714ce84db6b045a10bc869ff35a0db1201bcb98e1ad5bdb5bf6e3e1176426825947400f4ba744)
---

Friend,

I've got very exciting news.

The First Lady just finished hand-selecting photos for our Official 2020 Trump Calendar, and she wanted YOU to be the first to know.

Melania wants to make sure EVERY Patriot gets their calendar before 2020, which is why I'm personally reaching out to you to make sure you don't miss this opportunity.

name: Molly Keenan
subject: FWD: Add your name: Call on 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up my climate plan!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
It's time for action.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC) Friend, Did you see Jay's note? We know that climate is a winning issue for Democrats, and we need more from our candidates than empty talking points. We need real plans -- and Jay's already created the best one out there, and it's right there ready for them. **We need 2020 candidates to commit to taking on climate change, and we need them to adopt Jay's tried-and-true plan to do it:** [**Add your name to call on all the 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up Jay's climate plan right now.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC) Thanks, Molly \---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Friday, Nov 8, 2019
Subject: Add your name: Call on 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up my climate plan Friend, In one year, our country could look very different -- or it could get even worse. This week next year, Americans will cast their ballots, and there are essentially two outcomes: Either we elect a Democrat as our next president and mobilize the power of the United States to create a clean energy economy -- _or_ we have another four years of Donald Trump's campaign of climate denialism and environmental degradation, and we descend further into climate chaos. If you care about the world that our kids will inherit, there is nothing more critical than beating Donald Trump. But that's not good enough. We must demand more than a "win" -- we must demand that the next president take bold action to defeat the climate crisis. Anything less will spell disaster. **So my question to all the candidates is this: If elected, will you adopt my climate plan and put the United States on the path to defeating climate change?** [**I'm calling on all the 2020 candidates to sign onto my plan to build a clean energy economy, create 8 million new jobs, and ensure our children and grandchildren grow up with clean air and clean water: Add your name to join me.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC)
---
We can't let President Trump continue to lie and say that climate action means killing American jobs -- the fact is, defeating climate change _is_ a jobs message and will create millions of new jobs across America.
We're already showing the world that climate action is a jobs message here in Washington state, where I just dedicated one of the biggest biofuel refinery operations in the country. And where I recently visited the largest manufacturer of solar panels in North America. These are real jobs -- and this is a message you can argue across the Midwest and up and down the coasts.
Clean energy jobs are growing twice as fast as the average economy. And this is a message that resonates -- so I think this is a winner in every county, every zip code._I know that a progressive climate change message is how we win -- and it's how we save our planet._
Look, this is a big mountain to climb -- but we can't be paralyzed by the task. November 2020 is the next rock to grab in this climb, and Democrats need to win the presidency. How do they do that? By signing onto my climate plans and proving to voters that they're ready to step up to the plate and save our planet.
[**Join me in calling on the 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up my climate plan, commit to reversing the devastating effects of Donald Trump's presidency, and put American jobs and ingenuity first in ending climate change for good.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=7&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates?utm_source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&source=ema_2019-11-08_prez-signon-fwd&utm_campaign=prez-signon-fwd&utm_medium=ema&t=8&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://act.jayinslee.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=7983%2E868730%2Eg0ploC). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
PO BOX 21067 SEATTLE, WA 98111
---
All content (C) 2019 JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D), All Rights Reserved

name: Team Stephanie
subject: The last Republican district in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
In 2020 let's flip the last Republican Congressional district in NJ.
|
---

| | Friends, **Political campaigns and elections are all about the final result: winning.** Democrats made huge strides in 2018 that continued into this year's election, and team Stephanie is building on that momentum to bring us to victory in 2020. We know we can win next November, and we have the data to back it up:
1. Five New Jersey congressional districts have turned blue since 2016. Rep. Andy Kim (NJ-03), Rep. Tom Malinowski (NJ-07), and Rep. Mikie Sherill (NJ-11) flipped three tough districts like ours in 2018 emphasizing their service to our country in the military or with the State Department -- just like Stephanie.

2. In 2018, five of the 42 seats Democrats flipped in the House were districts just like ours -- R+8 or greater.

3. Democrats stayed strong in 2019, holding a significant majority in New Jersey state and local elections. And NJ-04 welcomed two new Democratic mayors in Mercer and Monmouth counties.

**Now, what do all these numbers mean?** One thing: we can flip the last Republican-held district in New Jersey. Our community is ready for change. And last Tuesday, Democrats across the country over-performed once again, proving we can keep expanding the map and winning seats once seen as unwinnable. **But in order to flip NJ-04, we need more grassroots support for Stephanie 's campaign. [Can you donate $20.20 to make sure we have what we need to win this race?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff082/522d4087/7afd0923/4f341f01/1122340326/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&refcode=20191110_em&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+donate+2020+to+make+sure+we+have&utm_campaign=20191109_em&source=20191109_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Chip in $3 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff082/522d4087/7afd0923/4f341f00/1122340326/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=20191109_em_abx_3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+3+now&utm_campaign=20191109_em&source=20191109_em")**
---
**[Chip in $10 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff082/522d4087/7afd0923/4f341f3f/1122340326/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191109_em_abx_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+10+now&utm_campaign=20191109_em&source=20191109_em")**
---
**[Chip in $18 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff082/522d4087/7afd0923/4f341f3e/1122340326/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&amount=18&refcode=20191109_em_abx_18&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+18+now&utm_campaign=20191109_em&source=20191109_em")**
---
**[Donate another amount now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff082/522d4087/7afd0923/4f341f3d/1122340326/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?express_lane=true&refcode=20191109_em_abx_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+Donate+another+amount+now&utm_campaign=20191109_em&source=20191109_em")**
---
Thanks for your support,
Team Stephanie

|

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-october?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Will you add your name to say you personally endorse Sara Gideon's campaign for U.S. Senate?
body:
Here's the truth...
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf70/3313081612/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
The only way we win this election and defeat Susan Collins is with all of us working together.
Because here's the truth: There are many special interest groups and corporate PACs who want nothing more than to defeat us.
They want to maintain the status quo and preserve a system where one bad accident or diagnosis can send a family spiraling into bankruptcy.
**But we CAN defeat them -- and that starts with you saying you're willing to fight. So will you?**
[**Add your name to personally endorse Sara Gideon 's campaign for U.S. Senate and say you're willing to fight _hard_ to defeat Susan Collins. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf77/3313081612/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191109-full")
Just remember, there are more of us than there are of them. If we come together to create the kind of grassroots movement I know we are capable of, nothing can stop us.
So please, add your name to say you endorse our people-powered campaign:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/Endorsement](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf77/3313081612/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191109-full")**
Thank you for signing your name and being a part of this team. I mean it when I say, we can't do this without you.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf77/3313081612/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/endorse-sara-gideon-for-maine?source=em191109-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf76/3313081612/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfe/4bef7a87/6bed675b/287fcf75/3313081612/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

Because here's the truth: There are many special interest groups and corporate PACs who want nothing more than to defeat us. They want to maintain the status quo and preserve a system where one bad accident or diagnosis can send a family spiraling into bankruptcy. But we CAN defeat them -- and that starts with you saying you're willing to fight. So will you? "" Just remember, there are more of us than there are of them. If we come together to create the kind of grassroots movement I know we are capable of, nothing can stop us. So please, add your name to say you endorse our people-powered campaign: "" Thank you for signing your name and being a part of this team. I mean it when I say, we can't do this without you. All my best, Amy Mesner Campaign Manager **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

You wouldn't know it with all the news coverage they get, but there are actually just 607 billionaires in the United States.

**Right now, it seems like a whole lot of them are scared. And if they're afraid because they're going to pay their fair share in taxes under a Warren presidency, so be it.** We're building a grassroots movement to shift our politics away from the opinions of the wealthy and the powerful -- and towards real change for working families.

**That's why today we're asking 607 grassroots donors from Pennsylvania to chip in -- one for every billionaire in America. When we fight side by side, we'll prove that a grassroots movement is more than a match for a billionaire super PAC.**

>
Being a billionaire can buy you a big yacht, a big house, and a whole lot of other things. But it doesn't buy you a bigger piece of our democracy.

That's why we're running this campaign with no PACs, no special interest groups, and no private fundraisers. We're powered by grassroots donors.

name: Cory Booker
subject: Can we hop on the phone?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| It's already time to start getting ready for the next DNC debate on November 20th -- and team, I want you to be a part of this. For the last few debates, we've sent out debate prep surveys that have received thousands of responses -- giving me valuable insight about the issues you want to hear discussed on the debate stage. **This time, I want to do something a little different. I 'm inviting you to join me for an exclusive debate prep call.** **[Sign up for the call now and we'll send you the details on how to join.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-prep-call-with-cory?source=em_rsvp_20191109_CB_20191109-rsvp-CB-debatecall-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I'll give you a rundown of how our prep sessions have been going so far and also tell you about my strategy heading into this next debate, which will be the most important one yet. **[RSVP to let me know that you'll be joining. I'll also be answering some questions on the call so if you have one, be sure to submit it here.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-prep-call-with-cory?source=em_rsvp_20191109_CB_20191109-rsvp-CB-debatecall-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Hope to talk to you on the call. Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/debate-prep-call-with-cory?source=em_rsvp_20191109_CB_20191109-rsvp-CB-debatecall-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

body:

| | I only have 96 hours left to qualify for the next debate. I'm fighting for a spot against two billionaire candidates -- _**one of whom just spent $55 MILLION from his own pocket to buy his way on that stage.**_ **_[I don 't have billions in personal wealth to funnel into my campaign. And frankly, that's not how I want to make the next debates. It would mean so much to me to have your $5 to make it instead. Can I count on your $5 in these final 96 hours? >> ](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191109_em_fr_b1_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_** Listen -- I refuse to be sidelined by billionaire candidates. Because we know that people who look like me... Who live in neighborhoods like the one where I grew up... Who struggle to pay the bills like my mom did... Can be overlooked in favor of billionaires, too. I need you to take a stand for me in these final 96 hours. name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: $23 Trillion
body:
We have to rein in spending before it's too late. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/89323409722f/calling-all-patriots-11994393?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b89caad7b9&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2db7b48894&e=795c6d9796)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=2e42954abb&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter,

Our debt just hit $23 trillion dollars.

[**Congress has utterly failed to do its duty and rein in unsustainable spending. Republicans and Democrats alike are to blame.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=a699f18bda&e=795c6d9796)

This is immoral.

If our generation fails to act, our children and grandchildren will not enjoy the freedoms and opportunities we inherited. Instead, they will face a life of suffocating taxes, more government control, and no economic growth all because we refused to live within our means. The days of out of control spending must end.

We must adopt a balanced budget that not only negates a deficit each year but also pays down the national debt on an ongoing basis. Doing so will require political courage, vigilance, and a willingness to take on the entrenched powers in the DC Swamp.

We need to elect a conservative to Congress from Oklahoma's 5th district to hold Congress accountable for its runaway spending. Kendra Horn meanwhile is a tax and spend Pelosi rubber-stamp who has no plan to rein in spending. We will never fix our spending problem so long as swing districts like Oklahoma's 5th district are held by liberal Democrats like Horn.

It's going to be a tough race, both in the primary and the general election. The only way we can make it across the finish line is [**if thousands of grassroots activists go the extra mile**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=568d73b6d9&e=795c6d9796) to help us get our message out: **Less Washington—more Oklahoma.**

[**Will you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us defeat Kendra Horn and rein in the enormous federal debt?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=1b35d4b8b8&e=795c6d9796)

Thank you for your support. Together we will win the primary, defeat liberal Democrat Kendra Horn, and bring conservative Oklahoma values to Washington.

Best,

\--Janet Barresi
---

---

Friend —
Less than two weeks until **Tulsi once again takes the debate stage on November 20th.**
**Tulsi has had break-through performances in all her debate appearances.** These presidential debates — watched by millions, covered extensively by the media — provide a powerful platform for Tulsi to share her unique vision for our country, with the country. It’s also an opportunity for those who have not yet learned about her lifetime of service and of speaking up against the status quo and establishment forces to get to know what she’s all about. **That’s why we’re so excited about this next debate, and why we need your help in making sure as many people as possible get to share the experience.**
**[Click here to host a TULSI2020 Debate Watch Party on November 20th. It will be an incredible opportunity to show your support, introduce your friends and family to Tulsi — and to get to know other Tulsi supporters.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11708158/119509658/-1769162031?sourceid=1014165&ms=em191109wp&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191109wp&contactdata=BnulQZw5pL3XfqlzE19acGXmFfRz2VuZOiAq%2BYMevJSXryvOltlm7LfhSbcW%2FwaUiZNKA8Lr4kEHJsQa0jjYorVYsYMdSyINAyT%2BAUjRn5E%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTUwNGJjMy02MjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0NMUqBHIV-YhsmX5xDNOBXEuuv9BLuGJ1lGT9CYOyI=&emci=19504bc3-6203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1a504bc3-6203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)**
Your debate watch party can be as small or as large as you feel comfortable with. You’ll have support from myself and the rest of the excellent TULSI2020 field team to help make sure your watch party is a success, and you will join hundreds of volunteers all across the country.
[HOST A WATCH PARTY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11708159/119509659/-1769162031?sourceid=1014165&ms=em191109wp&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191109wp&contactdata=BnulQZw5pL3XfqlzE19acGXmFfRz2VuZOiAq%2BYMevJSXryvOltlm7LfhSbcW%2FwaUiZNKA8Lr4kEHJsQa0jjYorVYsYMdSyINAyT%2BAUjRn5E%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTUwNGJjMy02MjAzLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g0NMUqBHIV-YhsmX5xDNOBXEuuv9BLuGJ1lGT9CYOyI=&emci=19504bc3-6203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=1a504bc3-6203-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311 "Button")

Margaret Gomes, TULSI2020

name: Team Hick
subject: [Roll Call] Gardner named most vulnerable Republican
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
That's right. Colorado is shaping up to be the epicenter of the fight for control of the Senate in 2020. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377147d/691c9bd/6ff711cc/11a7ff7d/1351603296/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

Roll Call just released its rankings of the U.S. Senators most at risk of losing in 2020--and a familiar name topped the Republicans on the list: [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191109_TH_20191109-fr-TH-rollcall-1mo_1mo_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") That's right. Colorado is shaping up to be the epicenter of the fight for control of the Senate in 2020.

**In this race, we 'll be up against every dirty special interest with a checkbook. **[**_Don 't let them buy this seat--chip in today and let's build the grassroots campaign that can take on the Republican machine._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191109_TH_20191109-fr-TH-rollcall-1mo_1mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

The flood of money from the other side has already begun.

We learned that Donald Trump was trying to buy support around impeachment among vulnerable Republican senators, raising six figures for Cory Gardner online after he voted to condemn the House's investigation.

Yesterday, Donald Trump headlined a high-dollar fundraiser on behalf of Gardner and other vulnerable Republicans, named "Save the Senate."

And late Thursday night, Trump attended another last-minute fundraiser to benefit a shady, dark money group with ties to Mitch McConnell that has said it's making the Colorado Senate race one of their top priorities.

So they've made this much clear: National Republicans are pulling out all the stops to hold on to this seat. Mitch McConnell thinks if they can win in Colorado, he can hang on to his majority.

But this Senate seat doesn't belong to Mitch McConnell, or Donald Trump, or even Cory Gardner. **It belongs to the people of Colorado.**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump doesn't know how to NOT lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Trump posted on Twitter Thursday claiming that he has a 50% approval rating \-- that could not be further from the truth. His approval rating is actually underwater at barely above 40%, with between 52% and 54% of Americans DISAPPROVING of him. He even claims (without evidence) that he has a 95% approval rating among Republicans. It's obvious that he won't listen to facts or the truth and will continue lying to the American people. While it seems far off, Election Day 2020 is just one year away, and we need to know exactly where the electorate stands on Trump so we can tailor our strategy to get him out of office: **Do you approve of Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc1a/6e9863e8/16239b7a/1db09825/2992958489/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Bem1cu0u") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc1a/6e9863e8/16239b7a/1db09825/2992958489/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/Bem1cu0u") Thank you so much for your participation. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc1a/6e9863e8/16239b7a/1db0982a/2992958489/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191109c.ND-b&refcode2=eek41PerJS4tpkynfqg0")

name: Debbie Stabenow
subject: here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I know how hard this race is.
| |
---
Friends,

Last year, the GOP spent _millions_ trying to defeat me in Michigan and elect John James.
**I've said it before, and I'll say it again:_John James is wrong for Michigan_**** _._** But with Donald Trump on the ballot this year, they'll fight harder - and spend more than ever - to elect the man who supports Trump's agenda "2000%."

It's already happening: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have funneled $3 million to help John James defeat my friend, Gary Peters.

I have a front-row seat to the destruction Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. **So right now, it has never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.** Because everything, from our democracy to the future of the Supreme Court, is at stake.

That's why this latest news has me so worried: **Recent polling shows this race is tied. And if Gary loses in Michigan, Democrats have ZERO chance at taking back the Senate in 2020.**
Gary's race will decide who controls the Senate, so we've set a goal to raise another $7,000 by midnight tonight. **But with just hours left, we're only 78% of the way there. In a race this close, with the future of the Senate and the Supreme Court on the line, falling short simply will not get it done**.
**Friends - every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing: [Please, will you rush $3 now to win in Michigan, reelect Gary and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c93/3191021765/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxMzEtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk131-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Take it from me - I know how important this race is for Michigan's future. Thank you for coming through.
Debbie Stabenow
U.S. Senator, Michigan
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c92/3191021765/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c91/3191021765/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c90/3191021765/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c6f/3191021765/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c92/3191021765/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa5a/5721a3ed/711b0f9b/efa8c91/3191021765/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |
